_comment: ThunderCats-style knock-off reimagined with warrior dogs, OPEN/BRIGHT/high-motion recipe. Heroic RUMBLE DOGS vs sorcerer GRIMJAW, no trademarked names. Render: python -m comfymovies --scene-file prompts/rumble_dogs.json --duration 60 --res 480p --quality --seed 7777
title: RUMBLE DOGS

scenes.prompt: 1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines, vivid fantasy colors: on a bright open alien plain under twin moons, a pack of armored warrior dogs in red capes gallops forward at full speed, their golden-furred leader raising a glowing crystal sword, dynamic sweeping camera, clear colorful sky

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: the shadowy jackal sorcerer GRIMJAW charges across the open plain with his skeletal minions and bat-winged beasts, green fire blazing, fast dynamic motion, bright dramatic light

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: an epic open-field clash, the golden RUMBLE DOGS leader leaps and swings his blazing crystal sword against GRIMJAW's dark staff, magical sparks exploding, the pack battling minions all around, high-energy dynamic action

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: triumphant golden sunrise on an open ridge, GRIMJAW dissolving into shadow as the victorious RUMBLE DOGS pack howls and charges forward, the leader thrusting his glowing crystal sword to the bright sky, sweeping heroic camera
